entity.summary: Multi-chain wallet and decentralized exchange application providing web, desktop, and mobile access to wallet and DEX functionality under the GLEEC ecosystem.
entity.notes: Current first-party endpoint is reachable. The official GLEECBTC organization repository explicitly identifies the product as `Gleec Wallet & DEX`, links dex.gleec.com, and documents web, desktop, and mobile builds. Confidence is medium because the public product documentation does not deeply expose current exchange mechanics; the June 2026 exchange candidate corpus independently corroborates the dex.gleec.com exchange identity.

evidence.title: GLEEC Wallet & DEX application
evidence.notes: Current first-party GLEEC wallet and DEX application endpoint is reachable at review time.

evidence.title: Gleec Wallet & DEX repository
evidence.notes: Official GLEECBTC organization repository explicitly identifies the product as `Gleec Wallet & DEX`, links the dex.gleec.com application, and documents support for web, desktop, Android, and iOS builds.

evidence.title: GLEEC Wallet exchange discovery entry
evidence.notes: June 2026 exchange candidate corpus identifies GLEEC Wallet under the dex.gleec.com domain, corroborating the first-party wallet-and-DEX identity.
